text: Welcome to Fragmented, the podcast where we talk about what's top of mind for Android developers.

speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: One trait that I've consistently noticed among the most successful engineers is the ability to rapidly prototype.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: Taking an idea from just a concept to something you can actually pull up on your phone or your computer or your tablet, whatever.
speaker: SPEAKER_00

text: That sense of agency and ability to rapidly prototype.

text: is exhilarating it's even more powerful in cross-functional settings imagine say talking to a designer or a product person just riffing on ideas and saying hey let me get back to you then you come back the next day with a working prototype

text: It's hard to overstate how impressive that is.
